---
title: "Reference / Cheat Sheet"
---

Keep this page open during the workshop. Grouped by track.

## Unix / Bash

| Command | Does |
|---------|------|
| `pwd` | print working directory |
| `ls -lah` | list files (long, all, human sizes) |
| `cd path` | change directory (`cd ..` up, `cd ~` home) |
| `mkdir -p a/b` | make directories, parents as needed |
| `cp src dst` / `mv src dst` | copy / move (or rename) |
| `rm -i file` | remove (interactive prompt) |
| `cat`, `less`, `head -n`, `tail -f` | view file contents |
| `grep -r "pat" .` | search recursively for a pattern |
| `find . -name "*.py"` | find files by name |
| `chmod +x script.sh` | make a script executable |
| `man cmd` / `cmd --help` | read the manual / quick help |
| `Ctrl-C` / `Ctrl-D` | interrupt / end-of-input |

## Git

| Command | Does |
|---------|------|
| `git init` | start tracking a repo |
| `git clone URL` | copy a remote repo |
| `git status` | what's changed |
| `git add file` / `git add -p` | stage changes (interactively) |
| `git commit -m "msg"` | record a snapshot |
| `git log --oneline --graph` | view history |
| `git diff` | show unstaged changes |
| `git branch name` / `git switch name` | create / switch branch |
| `git pull` / `git push` | sync with remote |
| `git restore file` | discard local changes to a file |

## CI/CD (GitHub Actions)

| Concept | Note |
|---------|------|
| Workflow | YAML file in `.github/workflows/` |
| Trigger | `on: [push, pull_request]` |
| Job â†’ steps | runs on a runner; steps run in order |
| `actions/checkout` | clones your repo into the runner |
| Matrix | run the same job across versions/OSes |

## ROS 2 (Jazzy)

| Command | Does |
|---------|------|
| `ros2 node list` | list running nodes |
| `ros2 topic list` / `ros2 topic echo /t` | list / inspect topics |
| `ros2 topic hz /t` | measure publish rate |
| `ros2 run pkg exe` | run a node |
| `ros2 launch pkg file.launch.py` | start a launch file |
| `ros2 param list` | list parameters |
| `rviz2` | 3D visualization |
| `ros2 bag record -a` / `ros2 bag play f` | record / replay data |

## AI / autonomy glossary

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **VLA** | Vision-Language-Action model â€” maps images + instructions to robot actions |
| **VLN** | Vision-Language Navigation â€” follow natural-language route instructions |
| **World model** | Learned model that predicts future states for planning |
| **Sim-to-real** | Transferring policies trained in simulation to physical robots |
| **LM** | Language model â€” used for instruction parsing, planning, tool use |
